question: State aur health facility availability ke hisaab se, average monthly per capita consumption aur total non-food spending ka breakdown do, sirf un areas mein jahan average consumption 329 se zyada ho, aur results ko total expenditure ke anusaar rank karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T2.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), SUM(T3.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_VILLAGE_INFRASTRUCTURE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T2.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) > 329 ORDER BY SUM(T3.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    gh.STATE,
    vi.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR,
    AVG(fhc.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) AS avg_monthly_per_capita_consumption,
    SUM(fhc.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) AS total_non_food_spending,
    RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(fhc.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC) AS expenditure_rank
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION fhc
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY gh ON fhc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = gh.GEOGRAPHY_ID
JOIN DIM_VILLAGE_INFRASTRUCTURE vi ON gh.GEOGRAPHY_ID = vi.GEOGRAPHY_ID
GROUP BY gh.STATE, vi.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR
HAVING AVG(fhc.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) > 329
ORDER BY expenditure_rank;

    gh.STATE,
    vi.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR,

    SUM(fhc.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) AS total_non_food_spending,
